title: A moonlit walk by the geofront
display_title: A moonlit walk by the geofront
wikitext:
[]: A moonlit walk by the geofront?             Quote Post by Kyle » Fri May 11, 2007 9:01 pm If you could take any eva character on a date,who would it be?What would you do on the date?Where would you take he/she? Pretend it's your one shot to impress the character of your choice. I don't want to hear Misato/bar/rufie in the same sentance. And be honest with yourself.Take real world things into account like...Do I have enough money to eat there?Is that a safe neigborhood?Would he/she like those kinds of movies?Also you have the choice of our world or the eva world to date in. You might learn somthing from other members posts...

[]: Re: A moonlit walk by the geofront?             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri May 11, 2007 9:10 pm Kyle wrote: I don't want to hear Misato/bar/rufie in the same sentance.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri May 11, 2007 9:43 pm I wouldn't want to meet any real world equivalents of any of the characters in Eva.

[]: Re: A moonlit walk by the geofront?             Quote Post by Executor » Fri May 11, 2007 10:04 pm DatDude wrote: Kyle wrote: I don't want to hear Misato/bar/rufie in the same sentance.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri May 11, 2007 10:15 pm I'd get Kaworu liquored up and make sweet love to him.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri May 11, 2007 10:30 pm Well, first I'd take Mahoro out for... ... oh wait, wrong Gainax show. Umm... I guess I'd take Mana out for a couple of drinks. I'm sure the bartender wouldn't mind her being underage, as long as I slipped him a few extra yen. Then back to my apartment where she could take a shower and pretend I'm Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Fri May 11, 2007 10:39 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I'd get Kaworu liquored up and make sweet love to him.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri May 11, 2007 11:04 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I'd get Kaworu liquored up and make sweet love to him.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri May 11, 2007 11:05 pm Kyle wrote: use water based lubricant's.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Fri May 11, 2007 11:28 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I'd get Kaworu liquored up and make sweet love to him.

[]:             Quote Post by Operation Yashima » Sat May 12, 2007 6:42 pm Executor wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: I'd get Kaworu liquored up and make sweet love to him.

[]:             Quote Post by Operation Yashima » Sun May 13, 2007 3:42 am ...series of merchandise...happy? :oops: :evil:

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun May 13, 2007 2:20 pm Only one I could go on a date with would be Maya. And no, she isn't a fucking lesbian.

[]:             Quote Post by Zkh » Sun May 13, 2007 4:05 pm don't want to hear Misato/bar/rufie in the same sentance.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun May 13, 2007 4:37 pm slothen wrote: And no, she isn't a fucking lesbian.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun May 13, 2007 4:40 pm Mr. Tines wrote: slothen wrote: And no, she isn't a fucking lesbian.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun May 13, 2007 4:43 pm DatDude wrote: You two should fight about it . . . with swords. . . . because their can be only one.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun May 13, 2007 4:54 pm BobBQ wrote: along with the refrigerator.
